AttestationMaterial.app_measurement_label: App binary or version measurement label.

CredentialMaterial.credential_root_label: Issuer credential Merkle root or stable id.
CredentialMaterial.region_code: Region or jurisdiction code as agreed with issuer.

DelegationMaterial.child_pk_label: Child public key fingerprint or label.
DelegationMaterial.parent_digest_label: Digest or label anchoring the parent authority.

HandshakeBindingMaterial.client_binding_tag: OAuth state, DCAPI binding, or similar tag.
HandshakeBindingMaterial.ephemeral_key_label: Ephemeral key fingerprint for this session.
HandshakeBindingMaterial.transcript_label: Handshake transcript hash label (how you name the digest).

IVC.cycle_tag: Batch or epoch name binding every step in the chain.
IVC.step_roots: Ordered Merkle roots or step labels, one event per entry.

LoginSessionMaterial.epoch: Unix time or counter slot; must fit in 32 bits for this encoding.
LoginSessionMaterial.policy_flags: Small bitfield for MFA tier, step-up, etc. (32-bit).
LoginSessionMaterial.rp_id: Relying party / app id the user sees at login.
LoginSessionMaterial.session_pk_label: Fingerprint or label of the session public key (hash recommended).

RevocationMaterial.accumulator_handle_label: Digest of accumulator state or CRS handle.
RevocationMaterial.nullifier_seed_label: Label derived from holder secret material (not raw sk on wire).
